page: Google Cloud Platform tpu7x-standard-1t is a specialized GPU-accelerated server instance designed for machine learning workloads. It features 56 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture and is equipped with 240.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 4.29 GB of RAM per core. The primary hardware accelerator is a single integrated tpu7x Tensor Processing Unit.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage options. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware configuration is optimized for resource-dense machine learning tasks, offering a high-density compute profile where the dedicated x86_64 host processor manages data pipelines and feeds the specialized tpu7x accelerator.

Due to the specialized nature of the tpu7x hardware, this server is designed specifically for deep learning workloads, including large-scale neural network training, machine learning inference, and data science pipelines. The lack of local storage and the high ratio of vCPUs to memory position it as a dedicated accelerator node rather than a general-purpose utility server.
description: Google Cloud Platform tpu7x-standard-1t is a specialized GPU-accelerated server instance designed for machine learning and deep learning workloads. The system features 56 dedicated vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 240.0 GB of system memory, which provides 4.29 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is driven by a single integrated tpu7x Tensor Processing Unit. This instance does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence, and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for high-density tensor computations, offloading heavy mathematical operations from the host CPU to the dedicated TPU. It is best suited for neural network training, machine learning inference, and complex data science pipelines.

tagline: A dedicated accelerator instance featuring fifty-six vCPUs and a specialized tensor processing unit for high-density machine learning workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 1 integrated tpu7x Tensor Processing Unit for accelerated tensor operations.
Features 56 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture.
Includes 240.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.29 GB of RAM per core.
Configured with no local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions.
Optimized for deep learning training, machine learning inference, and data science pipelines.
